Fix to documentation navigation menu toggle; UI/docs bug, no spec involvement.
Netty readTimeout behaves as MaxIdleTime; internal transport implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
Adding aggregation example to reference docs; documentation addition, no spec rule.
MongoNotPrimaryException on secondary read; likely a transient network/timing issue, no specific spec rule named as violated.

Race condition in AbstractSubscription completed tracking; internal async implementation bug, no spec rule.

GroupCommand API missing key function support after deprecation; API ergonomics gap, no spec rule.
Accidentally public modifier on IndexMap class; internal API cleanup, no spec rule.
Async cursor checks out redundant connection for killCursor; internal efficiency bug, no spec rule violated.
Uber JAR missing OSGI manifest headers; build/packaging regression, no spec rule.
createIndex/ensureIndex deprecation notices swapped vs MongoDB Manual; docs/API naming issue, no spec rule.
connectTimeout=0 causes immediate timeout; implementation bug contradicting own docs, no connection-string spec rule cited.
SDAM spec requires hidden members be treated as RSOther; driver ignores 'hidden' field and treats them as secondary.
Adding sharded/nonAtomic mapReduce modifiers to API; feature addition, no spec nonconformance described.
Spec requires MongoClient to default to server's write concern, not explicit w:1; driver conflates the two.

Deprecating legacy WriteConcern constants and methods; API cleanup, no spec rule violated.

NPE when batchSize not set in aggregate; Java null-unboxing implementation bug, no spec rule violated.

SSL example missing truststore configuration steps; documentation gap, no spec rule.
JsonReader doesn't accept ISODate() constructor; feature request for shell compatibility, no BSON spec rule cited.
JsonReader treats Date() same as new Date(); Extended JSON spec distinguishes them as string vs date object.
NPE in DB.createCollection when options=null; regression in documented null behavior, no spec rule.
DBPort closed flag not reset after retry success; internal connection state bug, no spec rule violated.
GridFS spec requires 255kB default chunk size; driver uses 255 bytes causing severe performance issue.
Integer-to-Long cast exception in GridFS on Android; platform-specific type casting bug, no spec rule violated.

Race condition: operation lost just after client creation; internal async initialization bug, no spec rule.
Async client package missing from published maven JAR; packaging/build issue, no spec rule.
Reference docs link to non-existent dropCollection method; docs error, no spec rule.
slaveOk=false incorrectly treated same as slaveOk=true; connection string parsing spec requires honoring the boolean value.
Background thread creates connections without calling open(); internal pool maintenance bug, no specific CMAP spec rule cited.
Server monitor fails to clear exception state; internal logging bug, no spec rule violated.
Mongo#readConcern property not respected in DBCollection; spec requires read concern inheritance from parent Mongo object.
DBCursor with null readPreference should inherit collection's read preference; spec defines read preference inheritance chain.
